titleStmt.title: SII 10.710: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 710. (A.R. No. 363 of 1905.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE MIDDLE OF THE VILLAGE OF BHŌGĀPURAM, BIMLIPATAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 110[0]. (11th year of Anantavarmadēva.)

summary.p: Records the construction of Rājarāja-Jinālaya in Bhōgāpuram alias Vikramagaṅgavīrapēṇṭa and grant of land to the said temple by Kannama-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1100
śrīmadanaṁttava¨rmmadēvara prava¨rddhamā
jayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 11
Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna
paṁppuna nānādēsi vikramagaṁgavīrapēṁṭṭa yaina [ bhō
gāpura ] muna vennapadēsaṭi koḍku dēsiyābharaṇa nāṁḍiseṭṭika
seṭi yettiṁccina śrīrājarājajinālayamunaku rājya
rāṣṭragrāmava¨rddhanagā dēsiraṭṭaḍla Anmatamuna vīrala Alamutū¨rppu
naṁ beṭṭina nivēdyabhūmi vuṭṭi Okkaṇḍu Ūri Īśānyamuna Akhaṇḍadīpamu
nakuṁ beṭṭina goṭlapuṭṭi Okkaṇḍu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigāṁ beṭṭiri
śākābdē nabhakhēṁducaṁdragaṇitē śrībhōgavu¨ryyāṁ prabhuḥ śrīmankannamanā
yaka ssumatimān kritvājisasthāpanām tasyāgāra macīkara tsuvilasacchai lai
dhābhāsuraṁ rāmā rāmagirau yadhā jinapadābjāsaktacitta svayaṁ
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yyō harētu vasundharā ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi Īdha¨rmupunaku vighnamu naḍaṁbaḍḍa
mccinā paṁccamahāpātakulu . tamaveddakoḍku kapālamunaṁ guḍi
cinavāru gaṁgga kaṟuta vēyigavilalaṁ boḍicina pāpamu
śrī Aṁbikādēviki nivēdyamunaku nāgamanāyakuṟālu veṭṭina
bhūmi baṁḍḍavaḍlu Ēṁdumu śrī
Digital edition of SII 10.710 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
